````text
### disabled

Source: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/4.6/classes/class_collisionshape2d.html

Controls whether the collision shape is active in the world. A disabled shape has no effect.

```APIDOC
## Property: disabled

### Description
A disabled collision shape has no effect in the world. This property should be changed with Object.set_deferred().

### Type
bool

### Default Value
`false`

### Accessors
- **Setter**: `void set_disabled(value: bool)`
- **Getter**: `bool is_disabled()`
```

--------------------------------

### void area_set_shape_disabled(area: RID, shape_idx: int, disabled: bool)

Source: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/4.6/classes/class_physicsserver2d.html

Sets whether a shape at a given index within a physics area is disabled.

```APIDOC
## area_set_shape_disabled

### Description
Sets whether a shape at a given index within a physics area is disabled.

### Method
area_set_shape_disabled

### Parameters
- **area** (RID) - Required - The RID of the area.
- **shape_idx** (int) - Required - The index of the shape.
- **disabled** (bool) - Required - If true, the shape will be disabled.

### Return Value
void
```

--------------------------------

### body_set_shape_disabled

Source: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/4.6/classes/class_physicsserver2d.html

Sets the disabled property of the body's shape with the given index. If `disabled` is `true`, then the shape will be ignored in all collision detection.

```APIDOC
## body_set_shape_disabled

### Description
Sets the disabled property of the body's shape with the given index. If `disabled` is `true`, then the shape will be ignored in all collision detection.

### Method Signature
void body_set_shape_disabled(body: RID, shape_idx: int, disabled: bool)

### Parameters
- **body** (RID) - The RID of the body.
- **shape_idx** (int) - The index of the shape.
- **disabled** (bool) - If `true`, the shape will be ignored in collision detection.
```

--------------------------------

### disable_mode

Source: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/4.6/classes/class_collisionobject3d.html

Determines the physics behavior of the CollisionObject3D when its Node.process_mode is set to Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED.

```APIDOC
## Property: disable_mode

### Description
Defines the behavior in physics when Node.process_mode is set to Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED.

### Type
`DisableMode`

### Default Value
`0`

### Methods
#### set_disable_mode
- **Signature**: `void set_disable_mode(value: DisableMode)`
- **Description**: Sets the disable mode.
- **Parameters**:
    - **value** (`DisableMode`) - Required - The new DisableMode value.

#### get_disable_mode
- **Signature**: `DisableMode get_disable_mode()`
- **Description**: Returns the current disable mode.
- **Returns**:
    - (`DisableMode`) - The current DisableMode value.
```

### Area2D

Source: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/4.6/classes/class_area2d.html

The collision detection for Area2D is managed by its collision shapes. You can add multiple CollisionShape2D or CollisionPolygon2D nodes as children to define the detection area. The `disabled` property of these shapes can be used to temporarily disable parts of the detection area.
````

````text
### body_entered

Source: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/4.6/classes/class_rigidbody3d.html

Emitted when a collision with another PhysicsBody3D or GridMap occurs.

```APIDOC
## Signal: body_entered(body: Node)

### Description
Emitted when a collision with another PhysicsBody3D or GridMap occurs. Requires contact_monitor to be set to `true` and max_contacts_reported to be set high enough to detect all the collisions. GridMaps are detected if the MeshLibrary has Collision Shape3Ds.

### Parameters
- **body** (Node) - The Node, if it exists in the tree, of the other PhysicsBody3D or GridMap.
```

--------------------------------

### Detecting Body Entry with Area2D for Item Collection

Source: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/4.6/tutorials/physics/using_area_2d.html

Connects the `body_entered` signal of an Area2D to free the node when a PhysicsBody2D (like a player) enters its region. This is useful for non-physical interactions such as collecting items.

```GDScript
extends Area2D

func _on_coin_body_entered(body):
	queue_free()

```

```C#
using Godot;

public partial class Coin : Area2D
{
    private void OnCoinBodyEntered(PhysicsBody2D body)
    {
        QueueFree();
    }
}

```

--------------------------------

### get_overlapping_bodies

Source: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/4.6/classes/class_area2d.html

Returns a list of intersecting PhysicsBody2Ds and TileMaps. Detection depends on collision layers and masks. The list is updated once per physics step.

```APIDOC
## get_overlapping_bodies

### Description
Returns a list of intersecting PhysicsBody2Ds and TileMaps. The overlapping body's CollisionObject2D.collision_layer must be part of this area's CollisionObject2D.collision_mask in order to be detected.
For performance reasons (collisions are all processed at the same time) this list is modified once during the physics step, not immediately after objects are moved. Consider using signals instead.

### Method
Array[Node2D] get_overlapping_bodies() const
```

### Area2D

Source: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/4.6/classes/class_area2d.html

Area2D provides signals to react to physics body interactions. `body_entered(body: Node)` is emitted when a physics body (RigidBody2D, StaticBody2D, CharacterBody2D) enters the Area2D. `body_exited(body: Node)` is emitted when a physics body leaves. Similarly, `area_entered(area: Area2D)` and `area_exited(area: Area2D)` are emitted for interactions with other Area2D nodes.

--------------------------------

### Area2D

Source: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/4.6/classes/class_area2d.html

Key signals for Area2D include 'body_entered' and 'body_exited', which are emitted when a physics body enters or leaves the area, respectively. There are also corresponding signals for areas entering and exiting: 'area_entered' and 'area_exited'.

````

```text
    40				if (area) {
    41					PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_set_transform(rid, gl_transform);

    43					PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->body_set_state(rid, PhysicsServer2D::BODY_STATE_TRANSFORM, gl_transform);
    44				}
    45	
    46				bool disabled = !is_enabled();
    47	
    48				if (disabled && (disable_mode != DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE)) {
    49					_apply_disabled();

    52				if (!disabled || (disable_mode != DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE)) {
    53					Ref<World2D> world_ref = get_world_2d();
    54					ERR_FAIL_COND(world_ref.is_null());
    55					RID space = world_ref->get_space();
    56					if (area) {
    57						PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_set_space(rid, space);
    58					} else {
    59						PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->body_set_space(rid, space);
    60					}
    61					_space_changed(space);
    62				}
    63	
    64				_update_pickable();
    65			} break;
    66	
    67			case NOTIFICATION_ENTER_CANVAS: {
    68				if (area) {
    69					PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_attach_canvas_instance_id(rid, get_canvas_layer_instance_id());
    70				} else {

    72				}
    73			} break;
    74	
    75			case NOTIFICATION_VISIBILITY_CHANGED: {
    76				_update_pickable();
    77			} break;
    78	
    79			case NOTIFICATION_TRANSFORM_CHANGED: {
    80				if (only_update_transform_changes) {
    81					return;
    82				}
    83	
    84				Transform2D gl_transform = get_global_transform();
    85	
    86				if (area) {
    87					PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_set_transform(rid, gl_transform);

    90				}
    91			} break;
    92	
    93			case NOTIFICATION_EXIT_TREE: {
    94				bool disabled = !is_enabled();
    95	
    96				if (!disabled || (disable_mode != DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE)) {
    97					if (callback_lock > 0) {
    98						ERR_PRINT("Removing a CollisionObject node during a physics callback is not allowed and will cause undesired behavior. Remove with call_deferred() instead.");
    99					} else {
   100						if (area) {
   101							PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_set_space(rid, RID());
   102						} else {
   103							PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->body_set_space(rid, RID());
   104						}
   105						_space_changed(RID());
   106					}

   111				}
```

```text
   214	
   215	void CollisionObject2D::set_disable_mode(DisableMode p_mode) {
   216		if (disable_mode == p_mode) {
   217			return;
   218		}
   219	
   220		bool disabled = is_inside_tree() && !is_enabled();
   221	
   222		if (disabled) {
   223			// Cancel previous disable mode.
   224			_apply_enabled();
   225		}
   226	
   227		disable_mode = p_mode;
   228	
   229		if (disabled) {
   230			// Apply new disable mode.
   231			_apply_disabled();
   232		}
   233	}
   234	
   235	CollisionObject2D::DisableMode CollisionObject2D::get_disable_mode() const {
   236		return disable_mode;
   237	}
   238	
   239	void CollisionObject2D::_apply_disabled() {
   240		switch (disable_mode) {
   241			case DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE: {
   242				if (is_inside_tree()) {
   243					if (callback_lock > 0) {
   244						ERR_PRINT("Disabling a CollisionObject node during a physics callback is not allowed and will cause undesired behavior. Disable with call_deferred() instead.");
   245					} else {
   246						if (area) {
   247							PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_set_space(rid, RID());
   248						} else {
   249							PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->body_set_space(rid, RID());
   250						}
   251						_space_changed(RID());
   252					}
   253				}
   254			} break;
   255	
   256			case DISABLE_MODE_MAKE_STATIC: {
   257				if (!area && (body_mode != PhysicsServer2D::BODY_MODE_STATIC)) {
   258					PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->body_set_mode(rid, PhysicsServer2D::BODY_MODE_STATIC);
   259				}
   260			} break;
   261	
   262			case DISABLE_MODE_KEEP_ACTIVE: {
   263				// Nothing to do.
   264			} break;
   265		}
   266	}
   267	
   268	void CollisionObject2D::_apply_enabled() {
   269		switch (disable_mode) {
   270			case DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE: {
   271				if (is_inside_tree()) {
   272					RID space = get_world_2d()->get_space();
   273					if (area) {
   274						PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_set_space(rid, space);
   275					} else {
   276						PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->body_set_space(rid, space);
   277					}
   278					_space_changed(space);
   279				}
   280			} break;
   281	
   282			case DISABLE_MODE_MAKE_STATIC: {
   283				if (!area && (body_mode != PhysicsServer2D::BODY_MODE_STATIC)) {
   284					PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->body_set_mode(rid, body_mode);
   285				}
   286			} break;
   287	
   288			case DISABLE_MODE_KEEP_ACTIVE: {
   289				// Nothing to do.
   290			} break;
   291		}
   292	}
   293	
   294	uint32_t CollisionObject2D::create_shape_owner(Object *p_owner) {
   295		ShapeData sd;
   296		uint32_t id;
   297	
   298		if (shapes.is_empty()) {
   299			id = 0;
   300		} else {
   301			id = shapes.back()->key() + 1;
   302		}
   303	
   304		sd.owner_id = p_owner ? p_owner->get_instance_id() : ObjectID();
   305	
   306		shapes[id] = sd;
   307	
   308		return id;
   309	}

   312		ERR_FAIL_COND(!shapes.has(owner));
   313	
   314		shape_owner_clear_shapes(owner);
   315	
   316		shapes.erase(owner);
   317	}

   329			}
   330		}
   331	}
```

```text
   355	
   356	void Area2D::_clear_monitoring() {
   357		ERR_FAIL_COND_MSG(locked, "This function can't be used during the in/out signal.");
   358	
   359		{
   360			HashMap<ObjectID, BodyState> bmcopy = body_map;
   361			body_map.clear();
   362			//disconnect all monitored stuff
   363	
   364			for (const KeyValue<ObjectID, BodyState> &E : bmcopy) {
   365				Object *obj = ObjectDB::get_instance(E.key);
   366				Node *node = Object::cast_to<Node>(obj);
   367	
   368				if (!node) { //node may have been deleted in previous frame or at other legitimate point
   369					continue;
   370				}
   371	
   372				node->disconnect(SceneStringName(tree_entered), callable_mp(this, &Area2D::_body_enter_tree));
   373				node->disconnect(SceneStringName(tree_exiting), callable_mp(this, &Area2D::_body_exit_tree));
   374	
   375				if (!E.value.in_tree) {
   376					continue;
   377				}
   378	
   379				for (int i = 0; i < E.value.shapes.size(); i++) {
   380					emit_signal(SceneStringName(body_shape_exited), E.value.rid, node, E.value.shapes[i].body_shape, E.value.shapes[i].area_shape);
   381				}
   382	
   383				emit_signal(SceneStringName(body_exited), obj);
   384			}
   385		}
   386	
   387		{
   388			HashMap<ObjectID, AreaState> bmcopy = area_map;
   389			area_map.clear();
   390			//disconnect all monitored stuff
   391	
   392			for (const KeyValue<ObjectID, AreaState> &E : bmcopy) {
   393				Object *obj = ObjectDB::get_instance(E.key);
   394				Node *node = Object::cast_to<Node>(obj);
   395	
   396				if (!node) { //node may have been deleted in previous frame or at other legitimate point
   397					continue;
   398				}
   399	
   400				node->disconnect(SceneStringName(tree_entered), callable_mp(this, &Area2D::_area_enter_tree));
   401				node->disconnect(SceneStringName(tree_exiting), callable_mp(this, &Area2D::_area_exit_tree));
   402	
   403				if (!E.value.in_tree) {
   404					continue;
   405				}
   406	
   407				for (int i = 0; i < E.value.shapes.size(); i++) {
   408					emit_signal(SceneStringName(area_shape_exited), E.value.rid, node, E.value.shapes[i].area_shape, E.value.shapes[i].self_shape);
   409				}
   410	
   411				emit_signal(SceneStringName(area_exited), obj);
   412			}
   413		}
   414	}
   415	
   416	void Area2D::_space_changed(const RID &p_new_space) {
   417		if (p_new_space.is_null()) {
   418			_clear_monitoring();
   419		}
   420	}
   421	
   422	void Area2D::set_monitoring(bool p_enable) {
   423		if (p_enable == monitoring) {
   424			return;
   425		}
   426		ERR_FAIL_COND_MSG(locked, "Function blocked during in/out signal. Use set_deferred(\"monitoring\", true/false).");
   427	
   428		monitoring = p_enable;
   429	
   430		if (monitoring) {
   431			PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_set_monitor_callback(get_rid(), callable_mp(this, &Area2D::_body_inout));
   432			PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_set_area_monitor_callback(get_rid(), callable_mp(this, &Area2D::_area_inout));
   433		} else {
   434			PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_set_monitor_callback(get_rid(), Callable());
   435			PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_set_area_monitor_callback(get_rid(), Callable());
   436			_clear_monitoring();
   437		}
   438	}
   439	
   440	bool Area2D::is_monitoring() const {
   441		return monitoring;
   442	}
   443	
   444	void Area2D::set_monitorable(bool p_enable) {
   445		ERR_FAIL_COND_MSG(locked || (is_inside_tree() && PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->is_flushing_queries()), "Function blocked during in/out signal. Use set_deferred(\"monitorable\", true/false).");
   446	
   447		if (p_enable == monitorable) {
   448			return;
   449		}
   450	
   451		monitorable = p_enable;
   452	
   453		PhysicsServer2D::get_singleton()->area_set_monitorable(get_rid(), monitorable);
   454	}
   455	
   456	bool Area2D::is_monitorable() const {
   457		return monitorable;
   458	}
   459	
   460	TypedArray<Node2D> Area2D::get_overlapping_bodies() const {
   461		TypedArray<Node2D> ret;
   462		ERR_FAIL_COND_V_MSG(!monitoring, ret, "Can't find overlapping bodies when monitoring is off.");
   463		ret.resize(body_map.size());
   464		int idx = 0;
   465		for (const KeyValue<ObjectID, BodyState> &E : body_map) {
   466			Object *obj = ObjectDB::get_instance(E.key);
   467			if (obj) {
   468				ret[idx] = obj;
   469				idx++;
   470			}
```

```text
   122	bool GodotArea2Pair2D::setup(real_t p_step) {

   153	bool GodotArea2Pair2D::pre_solve(real_t p_step) {

   167			}
   168		}
   169	
   170		return false; // Never do any post solving.
   171	}
```

```text
    95		} else if (!p_disabled && shape.bpid == 0) {
    96			if (!pending_shape_update_list.in_list()) {
    97				GodotPhysicsServer2D::godot_singleton->pending_shape_update_list.add(&pending_shape_update_list);
    98			}
    99		}
   100	}
   101	
   102	void GodotCollisionObject2D::remove_shape(GodotShape2D *p_shape) {
   103		//remove a shape, all the times it appears
   104		for (int i = 0; i < shapes.size(); i++) {
   105			if (shapes[i].shape == p_shape) {
   106				remove_shape(i);
   107				i--;
   108			}
   109		}
   110	}
   111	
   112	void GodotCollisionObject2D::remove_shape(int p_index) {
   113		//remove anything from shape to be erased to end, so subindices don't change
   114		ERR_FAIL_INDEX(p_index, shapes.size());
   115		for (int i = p_index; i < shapes.size(); i++) {
   116			if (shapes[i].bpid == 0) {
   117				continue;
   118			}
   119			//should never get here with a null owner
   120			space->get_broadphase()->remove(shapes[i].bpid);
   121			shapes.write[i].bpid = 0;
   122		}
   123		shapes[p_index].shape->remove_owner(this);
   124		shapes.remove_at(p_index);
   125	
   126		if (!pending_shape_update_list.in_list()) {
   127			GodotPhysicsServer2D::godot_singleton->pending_shape_update_list.add(&pending_shape_update_list);
   128		}
   129		// _update_shapes();
   130		// _shapes_changed();
   131	}
   132	
   133	void GodotCollisionObject2D::_set_static(bool p_static) {
   134		if (_static == p_static) {
   135			return;
   136		}
   137		_static = p_static;
   138	
   139		if (!space) {
   140			return;
   141		}
   142		for (int i = 0; i < get_shape_count(); i++) {
   143			const Shape &s = shapes[i];
   144			if (s.bpid > 0) {
   145				space->get_broadphase()->set_static(s.bpid, _static);
   146			}
   147		}
   148	}
   149	
   150	void GodotCollisionObject2D::_unregister_shapes() {
   151		for (int i = 0; i < shapes.size(); i++) {
   152			Shape &s = shapes.write[i];
   153			if (s.bpid > 0) {
   154				space->get_broadphase()->remove(s.bpid);
   155				s.bpid = 0;
   156			}
   157		}
   158	}
   159	
   160	void GodotCollisionObject2D::_update_shapes() {
   161		if (!space) {
   162			return;
   163		}
   164	
   165		for (int i = 0; i < shapes.size(); i++) {
   166			Shape &s = shapes.write[i];
   167			if (s.disabled) {
   168				continue;
   169			}
   170
```

```text
   207	
   208	int GodotPhysicsDirectSpaceState2D::intersect_shape(const ShapeParameters &p_parameters, ShapeResult *r_results, int p_result_max) {
   209		if (p_result_max <= 0) {
   210			return 0;
   211		}
   212	
   213		GodotShape2D *shape = GodotPhysicsServer2D::godot_singleton->shape_owner.get_or_null(p_parameters.shape_rid);
   214		ERR_FAIL_NULL_V(shape, 0);
   215	
   216		Rect2 aabb = p_parameters.transform.xform(shape->get_aabb());
   217		aabb = aabb.merge(Rect2(aabb.position + p_parameters.motion, aabb.size)); //motion
   218		aabb = aabb.grow(p_parameters.margin);
   219	
   220		int amount = space->broadphase->cull_aabb(aabb, space->intersection_query_results, GodotSpace2D::INTERSECTION_QUERY_MAX, space->intersection_query_subindex_results);
   221	
   222		int cc = 0;
   223	
   224		for (int i = 0; i < amount; i++) {
   225			if (cc >= p_result_max) {
   226				break;
   227			}
   228	
   229			if (!_can_collide_with(space->intersection_query_results[i], p_parameters.collision_mask, p_parameters.collide_with_bodies, p_parameters.collide_with_areas)) {
   230				continue;
   231			}
   232	
   233			if (p_parameters.exclude.has(space->intersection_query_results[i]->get_self())) {
   234				continue;
   235			}
   236	
   237			const GodotCollisionObject2D *col_obj = space->intersection_query_results[i];
   238			int shape_idx = space->intersection_query_subindex_results[i];
   239	
   240			if (!GodotCollisionSolver2D::solve(shape, p_parameters.transform, p_parameters.motion, col_obj->get_shape(shape_idx), col_obj->get_transform() * col_obj->get_shape_transform(shape_idx), Vector2(), nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, p_parameters.margin)) {
   241				continue;
   242			}
   243	
   244			r_results[cc].collider_id = col_obj->get_instance_id();
   245			if (r_results[cc].collider_id.is_valid()) {
   246				r_results[cc].collider = ObjectDB::get_instance(r_results[cc].collider_id);
   247			}
   248			r_results[cc].rid = col_obj->get_self();
   249			r_results[cc].shape = shape_idx;
   250	
   251			cc++;
   252		}
   253	
   254		return cc;
   255	}
   256
```

```text
   187	void GodotCollisionObject2D::_update_shapes_with_motion(const Vector2 &p_motion) {
   188		if (!space) {
   189			return;
   190		}
   191	
   192		for (int i = 0; i < shapes.size(); i++) {
   193			Shape &s = shapes.write[i];
   194			if (s.disabled) {
   195				continue;
   196			}
   197	
   198			//not quite correct, should compute the next matrix..
   199			Rect2 shape_aabb = s.shape->get_aabb();
   200			Transform2D xform = transform * s.xform;
   201			shape_aabb = xform.xform(shape_aabb);
   202			shape_aabb = shape_aabb.merge(Rect2(shape_aabb.position + p_motion, shape_aabb.size)); //use motion
   203			s.aabb_cache = shape_aabb;
   204	
   205			if (s.bpid == 0) {
   206				s.bpid = space->get_broadphase()->create(this, i, shape_aabb, _static);
   207				space->get_broadphase()->set_static(s.bpid, _static);
   208			}
   209	
   210			space->get_broadphase()->move(s.bpid, shape_aabb);
   211		}
   212	}

   214	void GodotCollisionObject2D::_set_space(GodotSpace2D *p_space) {
   215		GodotSpace2D *old_space = space;
   216		space = p_space;
   217	
   218		if (old_space) {
   219			old_space->remove_object(this);
   220	
   221			for (int i = 0; i < shapes.size(); i++) {
   222				Shape &s = shapes.write[i];
   223				if (s.bpid) {
   224					old_space->get_broadphase()->remove(s.bpid);
   225					s.bpid = 0;
   226				}
   227			}
   228		}
   229	
   230		if (space) {
   231			space->add_object(this);
   232			_update_shapes();
   233		}
   234	}
```

### 001042 agent_message `commentary`

关键源码结论基本确认：shape disabled 会从 broadphase 移除并进入 pending shape update；重新启用会重新创建 broadphase id；Area pair 的 enter/exit 是 pair 状态变化后写入 query，再在 `call_queries()` 里派发。脱树或 `disable_mode=REMOVE` 的本质都是 `set_space(RID())`，但脱树还能把半初始化节点隔离在场景树外。

### 001043 message `assistant`

关键源码结论基本确认：shape disabled 会从 broadphase 移除并进入 pending shape update；重新启用会重新创建 broadphase id；Area pair 的 enter/exit 是 pair 状态变化后写入 query，再在 `call_queries()` 里派发。脱树或 `disable_mode=REMOVE` 的本质都是 `set_space(RID())`，但脱树还能把半初始化节点隔离在场景树外。

```text
  1013	void *GodotSpace2D::_broadphase_pair(GodotCollisionObject2D *A, int p_subindex_A, GodotCollisionObject2D *B, int p_subindex_B, void *p_self) {
  1014		GodotCollisionObject2D::Type type_A = A->get_type();
  1015		GodotCollisionObject2D::Type type_B = B->get_type();
  1016		if (type_A > type_B) {
  1017			SWAP(A, B);
  1018			SWAP(p_subindex_A, p_subindex_B);
  1019			SWAP(type_A, type_B);
  1020		}
  1021	
  1022		GodotSpace2D *self = static_cast<GodotSpace2D *>(p_self);
  1023		self->collision_pairs++;
  1024	
  1025		if (type_A == GodotCollisionObject2D::TYPE_AREA) {
  1026			GodotArea2D *area = static_cast<GodotArea2D *>(A);
  1027			if (type_B == GodotCollisionObject2D::TYPE_AREA) {
  1028				GodotArea2D *area_b = static_cast<GodotArea2D *>(B);
  1029				GodotArea2Pair2D *area2_pair = memnew(GodotArea2Pair2D(area_b, p_subindex_B, area, p_subindex_A));
  1030				return area2_pair;
  1031			} else {
```

```text
    37	#define BODY_ISLAND_COUNT_RESERVE 128
    38	#define BODY_ISLAND_SIZE_RESERVE 512
    39	#define ISLAND_COUNT_RESERVE 128
    40	#define ISLAND_SIZE_RESERVE 512
    41	#define CONSTRAINT_COUNT_RESERVE 1024
    42	
    43	void GodotStep2D::_populate_island(GodotBody2D *p_body, LocalVector<GodotBody2D *> &p_body_island, LocalVector<GodotConstraint2D *> &p_constraint_island) {
    44		p_body->set_island_step(_step);
    45	
    46		if (p_body->get_mode() > PhysicsServer2D::BODY_MODE_KINEMATIC) {
    47			// Only rigid bodies are tested for activation.
    48			p_body_island.push_back(p_body);
    49		}
    50	
    51		for (const Pair<GodotConstraint2D *, int> &E : p_body->get_constraint_list()) {
    52			GodotConstraint2D *constraint = E.first;
    53			if (constraint->get_island_step() == _step) {
    54				continue; // Already processed.
    55			}
    56			constraint->set_island_step(_step);
    57			p_constraint_island.push_back(constraint);
    58			all_constraints.push_back(constraint);
    59	
    60			for (int i = 0; i < constraint->get_body_count(); i++) {
    61				if (i == E.second) {
    62					continue;
    63				}
    64				GodotBody2D *other_body = constraint->get_body_ptr()[i];
    65				if (other_body->get_island_step() == _step) {
    66					continue; // Already processed.
    67				}
    68				if (other_body->get_mode() == PhysicsServer2D::BODY_MODE_STATIC) {
    69					continue; // Static bodies don't connect islands.
    70				}
    71				_populate_island(other_body, p_body_island, p_constraint_island);
    72			}
    73		}
    74	}
    75	
    76	void GodotStep2D::_setup_constraint(uint32_t p_constraint_index, void *p_userdata) {
    77		GodotConstraint2D *constraint = all_constraints[p_constraint_index];
    78		constraint->setup(delta);
    79	}
    80	
    81	void GodotStep2D::_pre_solve_island(LocalVector<GodotConstraint2D *> &p_constraint_island) const {
    82		uint32_t constraint_count = p_constraint_island.size();
    83		uint32_t valid_constraint_count = 0;
    84		for (uint32_t constraint_index = 0; constraint_index < constraint_count; ++constraint_index) {
    85			GodotConstraint2D *constraint = p_constraint_island[constraint_index];
    86			if (p_constraint_island[constraint_index]->pre_solve(delta)) {
    87				// Keep this constraint for solving.
    88				p_constraint_island[valid_constraint_count++] = constraint;
    89			}
    90		}
    91		p_constraint_island.resize(valid_constraint_count);
    92	}
    93	
    94	void GodotStep2D::_solve_island(uint32_t p_island_index, void *p_userdata) const {
    95		const LocalVector<GodotConstraint2D *> &constraint_island = constraint_islands[p_island_index];
    96	
    97		for (int i = 0; i < iterations; i++) {
    98			uint32_t constraint_count = constraint_island.size();
    99			for (uint32_t constraint_index = 0; constraint_index < constraint_count; ++constraint_index) {
   100				constraint_island[constraint_index]->solve(delta);
   101			}
   102		}
   103	}
   104	
   105	void GodotStep2D::_check_suspend(LocalVector<GodotBody2D *> &p_body_island) const {
   106		bool can_sleep = true;
   107	
   108		uint32_t body_count = p_body_island.size();
   109		for (uint32_t body_index = 0; body_index < body_count; ++body_index) {
   110			GodotBody2D *body = p_body_island[body_index];
   111	
   112			if (!body->sleep_test(delta)) {
   113				can_sleep = false;
   114			}
   115		}
   116	
   117		// Put all to sleep or wake up everyone.
   118		for (uint32_t body_index = 0; body_index < body_count; ++body_index) {
   119			GodotBody2D *body = p_body_island[body_index];
   120	
   121			bool active = body->is_active();
   122	
   123			if (active == can_sleep) {
   124				body->set_active(!can_sleep);
   125			}
   126		}
   127	}
   128	
   129	void GodotStep2D::step(GodotSpace2D *p_space, real_t p_delta) {
   130		p_space->lock(); // can't access space during this
   131	
   132		p_space->setup(); //update inertias, etc
   133	
   134		p_space->set_last_step(p_delta);
   135	
   136		iterations = p_space->get_solver_iterations();
   137		delta = p_delta;
   138	
   139		const SelfList<GodotBody2D>::List *body_list = &p_space->get_active_body_list();
   140	
   141		/* INTEGRATE FORCES */
   142	
   143		uint64_t profile_begtime = OS::get_singleton()->get_ticks_usec();
   144		uint64_t profile_endtime = 0;
   145	
   146		int active_count = 0;
   147	
   148		const SelfList<GodotBody2D> *b = body_list->first();
   149		while (b) {
   150			b->self()->integrate_forces(p_delta);
   151			b = b->next();
   152			active_count++;
   153		}
   154	
   155		p_space->set_active_objects(active_count);
   156	
   157		// Update the broadphase to register collision pairs.
   158		p_space->update();
   159	
   160		{ //profile
   161			profile_endtime = OS::get_singleton()->get_ticks_usec();
   162			p_space->set_elapsed_time(GodotSpace2D::ELAPSED_TIME_INTEGRATE_FORCES, profile_endtime - profile_begtime);
   163			profile_begtime = profile_endtime;
   164		}
   165	
   166		/* GENERATE CONSTRAINT ISLANDS FOR MOVING AREAS */
   167	
   168		uint32_t island_count = 0;
   169	
   170		const SelfList<GodotArea2D>::List &aml = p_space->get_moved_area_list();
   171	
   172		while (aml.first()) {
   173			for (GodotConstraint2D *E : aml.first()->self()->get_constraints()) {
   174				GodotConstraint2D *constraint = E;
   175				if (constraint->get_island_step() == _step) {
   176					continue;
   177				}
   178				constraint->set_island_step(_step);
   179	
   180				// Each constraint can be on a separate island for areas as there's no solving phase.
   181				++island_count;
   182				if (constraint_islands.size() < island_count) {
   183					constraint_islands.resize(island_count);
   184				}
   185				LocalVector<GodotConstraint2D *> &constraint_island = constraint_islands[island_count - 1];
   186				constraint_island.clear();
   187	
   188				all_constraints.push_back(constraint);
   189				constraint_island.push_back(constraint);
   190			}
   191			p_space->area_remove_from_moved_list((SelfList<GodotArea2D> *)aml.first()); //faster to remove here
   192		}
   193	
   194		/* GENERATE CONSTRAINT ISLANDS FOR ACTIVE RIGID BODIES */
   195	
   196		b = body_list->first();
   197	
   198		uint32_t body_island_count = 0;
   199	
   200		while (b) {
   201			GodotBody2D *body = b->self();
   202	
   203			if (body->get_island_step() != _step) {
   204				++body_island_count;
   205				if (body_islands.size() < body_island_count) {
   206					body_islands.resize(body_island_count);
   207				}
   208				LocalVector<GodotBody2D *> &body_island = body_islands[body_island_count - 1];
   209				body_island.clear();
   210				body_island.reserve(BODY_ISLAND_SIZE_RESERVE);
   211	
   212				++island_count;
   213				if (constraint_islands.size() < island_count) {
   214					constraint_islands.resize(island_count);
   215				}
   216				LocalVector<GodotConstraint2D *> &constraint_island = constraint_islands[island_count - 1];
   217				constraint_island.clear();
   218				constraint_island.reserve(ISLAND_SIZE_RESERVE);
   219
```

### 001071 agent_message `commentary`

社区资料里有两个有用证据：Godot issue #92691 是 4.x confirmed physics 讨论，和我们的“disabled/shape 改变导致 exit+enter”一致；论坛/Reddit 的常见解决方向是 deferred、延后处理、离开树或重新初始化碰撞状态，但这些都需要项目级状态机，而不是简单属性开关。现在看本地 Resources 里其他引擎/框架是否给出不同心智模型。

**Output**

```text
Chunk ID: 516c41
Wall time: 0.0000 seconds

Output:
Total output lines: 157

/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:16:- `Adopt Later`：`EntityCommandRecorder` 证明 deferred structural operation 对 C# ECS 有实际价值，尤其是多线程或遍历阶段不能安全改实体结构时。SlimeAI 可用更小的 `DeferredRuntimeCommand` / `RuntimeCommandQueue` 覆盖 spawn、destroy、relationship 变更和 Godot node request，不应复制 DefaultEcs 的 unsafe byte buffer。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:54:`World` 是中心 hub：负责 entity id 分配、component pool、world-level component、query builder、optimization、publish/subscribe 和 dispose。`World.CreateEntity` 创建 enabled entity 并发布 `EntityCreatedMessage`；`World.GetEntities()` / `GetDisabledEntities()` 只返回 builder，真正的缓存容器在 `AsSet` / `AsMap` 等阶段创建。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:56:`Entity` 是 readonly struct handle，但它暴露大量直接 mutation API：`Set<T>`、`Remove<T>`、`Disable/Enable`、component disable/enable、`SetSameAs`、`SetSameAsWorld`、`NotifyChanged`、`CopyTo`、`Dispose`。这些 API 都可直接发布 internal messages，驱动 query container 和 subscription 更新。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:58:`Entity.Disable()` 与 `Dispose()` 语义不同：disable 让 entity 从 enabled query 中消失但保留组件，dispose 清理 entity 并不应再使用。component disable/enable 也会让对应组件对 query 表现为 composition 变化，但 `Has<T>` 仍可能为真。这个语义适合运行时内部优化，不适合直接暴露给 AI 作为业务状态协议。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:86:`WorldRecord` 支持 deferred `CreateEntity`、world component `Set<T>`、`Remove<T>`。`EntityRecord` 支持 entity enable/disable、component enable/disable、component set/remove、`SetSameAs`、`SetSameAsWorld`、`NotifyChanged`、`CopyTo`、`Dispose`。`Execute()` 调用 internal `Executer.Execute` 顺序解释 byte buffer，然后 `Clear()`。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:88:测试覆盖了 recorder 对已有 entity 和新建 entity 的 create、enable/disable、component set/remove、notify changed、same-as、copy、fixed capacity full、parallel record、execute 后清空、clear 后不执行等行为。这说明它不是文档摆设，而是 DefaultEcs 处理结构变更安全性的核心工具。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:121:- DefaultEcs API 像 `Entity` / `World` API 的 deferred 镜像，粒度是 enable/disable/set/remove/notify/copy/dispose。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:123:- DefaultEcs 使用 unsafe byte buffer 和 component command registry；Arch 使用 pooled list、sparse set、structural sparse set 和 negative entity resolve。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:134:`Adopt Later`：增加 deferred structural command RFC。第一版只覆盖 `EntityManager.Spawn/Register/Destroy/Clear`、`RelationshipManager.Add/Remove/BindParentRelationships`、Projectile / Effect spawn、GodotBridge node instantiate / cleanup request。flush 顺序建议为 `Capability Tick -> DeferredRuntimeCommand Flush -> Entity/Relationship Event -> Observation`。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:162:`Adopt Later`：如果引入 deferred command，必须测试 create 后立即 attach relation、destroy parent 递归策略、Projectile lifetime destroy、Effect spawn cleanup、flush 后 event 顺序、重复 flush、clear 不执行。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:166:`Adopt Later`：Observation 应记录 selector owner、query / target count、command queue count、flush order、relationship add/remove、entity spawn/destroy 和 blocked reason。不要读取 query container 内部索引作为调试主入口。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:183:| Deferred structural command RFC | `Adopt Later` | `Plans/RuntimeCommandBuffer_RFC_2026-05-08.md`、`GameOS/Runtime/Entity/*`、`GameOS/Runtime/Relationship/*` | 先定义 spawn/destroy/relationship/Godot node request 的最小 command 集和 flush 顺序 |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/05-DefaultEcs-源码分析报告.md:212:| `SlimeAI/Tests/SlimeAI.GameOS.Tests/Program.cs` | 后续加测试 | 锁 deferred spawn/destroy/relationship/flush/event order、selector 生命周期和 relationship policy |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/EngineSourceAnalysis/Prompts/01-Bevy-plan-review-prompt.md:20:- ECS relationship / hierarchy / recursive despawn。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/flecs/02-Flecs-源码分析报告.md:30:| Relationship / hierarchy storage | `Engine/flecs/src/storage/component_index.c`、`Engine/flecs/src/storage/table.c`、`Engine/flecs/src/storage/table_graph.c`、`Engine/flecs/src/tree_spawner.c` | `ChildOf` record fast path、`EcsParent` non-fragmenting hierarchy、table flags、`IsA` override、`ChildOf` prefab propagation、`Parent` 与 `ChildOf` 互斥切换、tree spawner |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/flecs/02-Flecs-源码分析报告.md:61:`src/storage/table_graph.c` 在添加 `IsA` 时会检查 prefab overrides；添加 `ChildOf` 指向 prefab target 时会把子 entity 标为 prefab。`src/tree_spawner.c` 的文件头说明它用于加速 hierarchy 创建；构建 prefab child 类型时会加入 `EcsParent`，跳过 `DontInherit` / `Inherit` 项，处理 `AUTO_OVERRIDE`，并最终添加 `IsA(child)`。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/flecs/02-Flecs-源码分析报告.md:91:`FlecsPipelineImport` 创建内建 phases，并用 pipeline query 选择 `EcsSystem`、`Phase(cascade DependsOn)`，排除 disabled 的 `DependsOn` / `ChildOf` 上游实体。这里的 pipeline 本身也是 query + relationship traversal + order 的组合。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/flecs/02-Flecs-源码分析报告.md:135:`Adopt Later`：在 `RuntimeSchedule` 上增加显式阶段和结构变更 flush 记录。短期只需要把 spawn/despawn、parent attach/detach、Godot node attach/detach 等结构变更标成可观察边界，不需要复制 Flecs pipeline query。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/flecs/02-Flecs-源码分析报告.md:147:`Adopt Now`：业务引用字段进入 schema / snapshot validation。DataOS 应验证 `OwnerId`、`SourceId`、`TargetId`、`ContainerId`、`PrefabId` 是否存在、是否允许为空、是否跨 scene / pool 边界，而不是验证任意 relationType 字符串。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/flecs/02-Flecs-源码分析报告.md:192:| Deferred structural change boundary | `Adopt Later` | `stage.c` readonly 后只能 enqueue commands；`pipeline.c` merge 时统计 command queue | `RuntimeCommandBuffer_RFC`、Entity / Relationship / GodotBridge tests | 先限定在 spawn/despawn/attach/detach，保留 EventBus 和 service API |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/flecs/02-Flecs-源码分析报告.md:194:| Prefab / `IsA` authoring expansion | `Adopt Later` | `tree_spawner.c` 处理 `AUTO_OVERRIDE` 和 `IsA(child)`；`inventory_system` prefab 设置 item 默认值 | `SlimeAI/DataOS/README.md`、DataOS schema / generators | DataOS 展开 prefab 默认值和 override，Runtime 使用明确 snapshot |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:18:- `Adopt Now`：Runtime 热路径不应查 SQLite authoring DB。Unity 样例的 runtime 系统读取 singleton component、prefab load result、blob asset、physics world、dynamic buffer；SlimeAI 对应应继续读取 `RuntimeDataSnapshot` / `RuntimeEntity.Data` / `ResourceCatalog`。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:20:- `Adopt Later`：PhysicsSamples 的 collision filter、stateful collision/trigger events、query visualizer、determinism tests 可转化为 SlimeAI Collision / Target / Validation / Observation 的测试与报告形态；不应转化为 Unity Physics API 克隆。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:23:- `Reject`：运行时 collider blob mutation、multi physics world、immediate physics simulation、predicted physics、复杂 vehicle / character controller / joint demos 不适合作为 SlimeAI 当前阶段的 Capability 目标。它们只可作为后续底层研究或验证压力样例。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:29:| Repo 定位与版本 | `README.md`、`EntitiesSamples/README.md`、`PhysicsSamples/README.md`、`NetcodeSamples/README.md`、各 `Packages/manifest.json` | Root README 声明 Unity 6.2 和 Entities / Netcode / Physics / Entities.Graphics 1.4 release；Physics manifest 使用 `com.unity.entities` / `com.unity.physics` 1.4.3；Netcode manifest 使用 `com.unity.netcode` 1.12.0 |

/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:109:`Dots101/Entities101/Assets/Kickball/Step 1/ConfigAuthoring.cs` 把障碍物、玩家、球、速度、踢球距离、prefab 等 authoring 字段收拢到 `Config : IComponentData` singleton。后续 `PlayerAuthoring.cs`、`BallAuthoring.cs` 给 entity 添加 tag、velocity、enableable `Carry`。`BallCarrySystem.cs` 和 `BallKickingSystem.cs` 直接按 `Config` 和 tag/component 完成 pick up / kick 行为。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:115:SlimeAI 推论：Survivor2D profile 不应一上来设计成完整通用 DSL。应先用 profile preset 把能力集合、运行阶段、spawn config、目标查询策略、资源入口、验证场景写清楚；内部 hot path 继续允许专用数组、service index 和 capability-owned data。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:121:`Assets/6. Events/Scripts/Stateful/StatefulSimulationEventBuffers.cs` 将上一帧和当前帧事件 merge 成 `Enter / Stay / Exit` 状态；`StatefulTriggerEventBufferSystem.cs` 从 `ITriggerEventsJob` 收集事件后写入 dynamic buffer；`StatefulCollisionEventBufferSystem.cs` 从 `ICollisionEventsJob` 收集 collision event，并可按需计算接触点、冲量等 details。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:129:`Assets/9. Modify/Scripts/Systems/ChangeFilterCountdownSystem.cs` 在 fixed step / before physics 里倒计时修改 `PhysicsCollider` 的 `CollisionFilter`。`RotateThroughCollisionFiltersSystem.cs` 明确依赖 3 个连续 category bit，并在 collider blob 非 unique 时输出 warning：修改共享 collider blob 会影响所有使用者。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:133:`Assets/10. Immediate Mode/Scripts/ProjectIntoFutureOnCueAuthoring.cs` clone 当前 `PhysicsWorld` 到 local world，用 `ImmediatePhysicsWorldStepper` 多步模拟未来轨迹，维护 ghost trail entity pool。这需要 clone world、reset simulation context、手动同步 collision world。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:135:SlimeAI 推论：这些机制当前应 `Reject`，最多留作后续 Godot PhysicsServer2D trace / collision debug 的研究参考。SlimeAI 当前 Survivor2D 只需要清晰 collision layer/mask、hurtbox/contact damage、target query、scene smoke 和 validation report。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:175:`Adopt Now`：Collision Capability 应补一份 validation checklist：layer/mask、collision filter、hurtbox/hitbox、contact damage、trigger enter/stay/exit、同帧多命中、resource path、scene smoke marker。PhysicsSamples 支持把这些做成场景级测试，而不是只做 unit test。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:179:`Reject`：不引入 Unity Physics 的 broadphase-pair modification、contact normal mutation、runtime collider blob mutation、immediate mode world clone、多 world predicted physics 到当前 Collision / Movement public API。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:207:`Adopt Later`：为 Survivor2D profile 建 sample validation scenes：movement/collision/damage/ability/target/spawn/hud 的最小场景，输出 PASS/FAIL marker，并将 scene run artifact 链接到 validation report。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md:253:| Immediate physics world clone / predicted physics | `Reject` | `ProjectIntoFutureOnCueSystem` clone `PhysicsWorld` 并手动 step local simulation | 当前复杂度高，验证成本大，不适合 M18-MP0 阶段 |

/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/QFramework/06-QFramework拒绝清单.md:145:- 不处理 Entity lifecycle…3107 tokens truncated…线程？SlimeAI 在哪帧能安全读取物理结果？ | `servers/physics_2d/physics_server_2d_wrap_mt.cpp` | `rg -n "WorkerThread\|_thread_safe\|flush" servers/physics_2d/physics_server_2d_wrap_mt.cpp` |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:18:- `Adopt Later`：`Commands` / `CommandQueue` / `ApplyDeferred` 适合作为 SlimeAI `RuntimeCommandBuffer` 的设计参考，用于统一 spawn、despawn、relationship 更新和事件刷新边界；但当前 Godot C# GameOS 已有 EventBus、service 方法和 Godot node 生命周期，短期不应重构为 deferred-first。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:19:- `Adopt Now`：Relationship 简化应优先 typed lifecycle parent/children。Bevy `Relationship` 明确 source entity 上的 relationship component 是 source-of-truth，target collection 是反向缓存；递归销毁只适合 `linked_spawn` 这类生命周期归属，不适合任意业务图清理。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:28:| 默认插件组合 | `crates/bevy_internal/src/default_plugins.rs`、`examples/app/plugin_group.rs` | `DefaultPlugins`、`MinimalPlugins`、`PluginGroupBuilder::add`、`set`、`disable`、`add_before`、`add_after` |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:30:| Main schedule 与 fixed update | `crates/bevy_app/src/main_schedule.rs`、`crates/bevy_time/src/lib.rs`、`crates/bevy_time/src/fixed.rs`、`examples/ecs/fixed_timestep.rs`、`examples/movement/physics_in_fixed_timestep.rs` | `Main`、`PreUpdate`、`RunFixedMainLoop`、`Update`、`PostUpdate`、`FixedMain`、`FixedUpdate`、`RunFixedMainLoopSystems`、`Time<Fixed>` |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:33:| Relationship / hierarchy | `crates/bevy_ecs/src/relationship/mod.rs`、`relationship/related_methods.rs`、`relationship_query.rs`、`relationship_source_collection.rs`、`hierarchy.rs`、`world/mod.rs`、`world/entity_access/world_mut.rs`、`crates/bevy_transform/src/systems.rs`、`examples/ecs/relationships.rs`、`examples/ecs/hierarchy.rs` | `Relationship`、`RelationshipTarget`、`ChildOf`、`Children`、`linked_spawn`、`allow_self_referential`、`World::despawn`、`EntityWorldMut::despawn` |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:34:| State cleanup | `crates/bevy_state/src/lib.rs`、`app.rs`、`condition.rs`、`commands.rs`、`state/`、`state_scoped.rs`、`state_scoped_events.rs`、`examples/ecs/state_scoped.rs`、`examples/state/states.rs` | `States`、`OnEnter`、`OnExit`、`OnTransition`、`StateTransitionEvent`、`in_state`、`DespawnOnExit`、`DespawnOnEnter`、`DespawnWhen`、`DisableOnExit`、`EnableOnEnter` |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:55:`PluginGroupBuilder` 内部保存 `plugins: TypeIdMap<PluginEntry>` 和 `order: Vec<TypeId>`，提供 `set`、`add`、`try_add`、`add_group`、`add_before`、`add_after`、`enable`、`disable`、`finish`。`finish` 按 `order` 调用 `app.add_boxed_plugin`。示例 `examples/app/plugin_group.rs` 展示自定义 group、禁用 plugin 和在目标 plugin 之前插入 plugin。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:75:`Commands` 是 structural change command queue。它作为 `SystemParam` 依赖 `Deferred<CommandQueue>`，可排队 spawn、despawn、insert resource、custom closure command 等。命令不是写入时立即全局可见，而是在 `ApplyDeferred` 执行时按序应用。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:81:### 3.5 Relationship、Hierarchy 与 Recursive Despawn
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:85:`hierarchy.rs` 中 `ChildOf` 是 parent/child hierarchy 的 source-of-truth component，挂在 child/source entity 上；`Children` 是 target entity 上的 `RelationshipTarget` collection。插入 `ChildOf` 会立即通过 component hook 维护 parent 的 `Children`。`Children` 配置了 `#[relationship_target(relationship = ChildOf, linked_spawn)]`，因此父实体 despawn 时会递归 despawn children。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:87:`RelationshipTarget::LINKED_SPAWN` 的文档说明：当它为 true 时，despawn 或 linked cloning 会递归处理 target collection 中的 source entities。`World::despawn` / `EntityWorldMut::despawn` 文档也说明会递归 despawn `Children` 和其它配置了 recursive descendant despawn 的 `RelationshipTarget`。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:97:`state_scoped.rs` 提供 `DespawnWhen`、`DespawnOnExit`、`DespawnOnEnter`、`DisableWhen`、`DisableOnExit`、`DisableOnEnter`、`EnableWhen`、`EnableOnExit`、`EnableOnEnter`。这些 system 读取最新 `StateTransitionEvent`，匹配 predicate 后通过 `commands.entity(entity).try_despawn()` 或递归插入 / 移除 `Disabled` 执行 cleanup。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:109:`Adopt Later`：`RuntimeCommandBuffer` 值得写 RFC 和实验测试，但不应马上替换 EventBus / service API。适合的第一步是只包住 entity spawn/despawn、parent relationship 变更、Godot node attach/detach 这些生命周期结构变更。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:119:`Adopt Now`：Bevy Cargo feature profile 对 SlimeAI 的对应物不是 C# 包裁剪，而是 DataOS authoring profile、runtime capability set 和 platform/test preset。`ScheduleDataKeys` 已有 system config、preset、spawn config 字段，可作为 Profile authoring 的第一批输入。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:121:`Adopt Later`：DataOS 可增加 `GenreProfile` 级 override 规则，例如 Survivor2D 默认启用 Movement、Collision、Damage、Ability、Feature、AI、Projectile、Effect、Unit、Attack，并允许游戏侧覆盖 spawn / HUD / drop / level-up 等候选能力。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:127:`Adopt Later`：state-scoped cleanup 可用于 Godot UI 临时节点、特效节点、投射物节点和召唤物节点清理。实现方式应沿用 `RelationshipType.Parent` / typed lifecycle relation 与 GodotBridge node pool 的生命周期，不引入 Bevy `Disabled` component 语义。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:169:| 对所有业务关系启用 recursive despawn | `Reject` | Bevy recursive despawn 只绑定 `linked_spawn` lifecycle relation；目标锁定、伤害来源、buff 影响等关系不应级联销毁 |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:194:| GameOS Runtime | `RuntimeCommandBuffer` 仅作为 deferred structural change 实验，先覆盖 spawn/despawn/relationship lifecycle flush | `Adopt Later` | `SlimeAI/Plans/RuntimeCommandBuffer_RFC_2026-05-08.md` |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/bevy/01-Bevy-源码分析报告.md:197:| DataOS | `GenreProfile` 拆成 authoring profile、runtime capability set、platform/test preset，复用 `ScheduleDataKeys` 的 system / preset / spawn 字段 | `Adopt Now` | `SlimeAI/DataOS/Profiles/Survivor2D.md`、`SlimeAI/GameOS/Runtime/Schedule/ScheduleDataKeys.cs` |
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/EngineSourceAnalysis/Tasks/04-Arch-源码分析任务.md:232:- SlimeAI 的最小 deferred command 集是否应覆盖 spawn、destroy、attach child、detach child、emit event、load resource request、Godot node instantiate request。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/EngineSourceAnalysis/Tasks/04-Arch-源码分析任务.md:239:- Tick 内直接 `EntityManager.Destroy`、Projectile lifetime destroy、Damage kill destroy、Effect spawn 是否存在同帧遍历风险。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/EngineSourceAnalysis/Tasks/04-Arch-源码分析任务.md:270:- 给出一个 SlimeAI deferred command 最小方案草案，至少覆盖 spawn、destroy、attach child、detach child、emit event、load resource request、Godot node instantiate request。
/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Docs/EngineSourceAnalysis/Tasks/04-Arch-源码分析任务.md:273:- 给出测试落点，至少覆盖 `EntityManager` 生命周期、parent destroy policy、projectile/effect spawn-destroy、schedule playback 顺序。
```

当前关键技术结论（需要写回文档）：

1. Godot 4.6 官方/Context7 结论
- 已跑：
  - `npx ctx7@latest library "Godot Engine" "..."`
  - 选中 `/websites/godotengine_en_4_6`
  - `npx ctx7@latest docs /websites/godotengine_en_4_6 "..."`
- 重要结果：
  - `CollisionShape2D.disabled` 官方说明：disabled shape has no effect in world，但该属性 should be changed with `Object.set_deferred()`
  - `Area2D.get_overlapping_bodies()`：overlap list is updated once during physics step, not immediately after objects are moved
  - `Area2D.monitoring/monitorable` 只是检测/被检测开关，不保证清掉旧物理 pair / query event
  - Context7 对 `CollisionObject2D.disable_mode` 有时偏到 3D，但本地源码已确认 2D 语义：`DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE` 与 `ProcessMode.Disabled` 下 `set_space(RID())` 相关

2. Web / 社区线索
- 已尝试 web search：
  - “Godot Area2D disabled CollisionShape2D body_entered triggered when disabled enabled issue object pool”
  - “Godot set_deferred CollisionShape2D disabled physics callback object pool ghost collision”
  - “Godot Area2D monitoring monitorable change not updating existing collision pair issue”
  - “Godot object pooling Area2D collision ghost body_entered disable enable”
  - “Godot issue disable enable CollisionShape2D causes body_entered body_exited same frame #92691”
  - “Godot issue Area2D monitorable existing pair not updated #67731”
- 关键可引用：
  - Godot issue `godotengine/godot#92691`：4.x confirmed physics 方向，和 “disable/enable shape 导致 exit + enter / stale events” 一致。
  - 论坛/社区常见建议是 deferred、延后、离树、重建/重置状态，但这只说明需要状态机，不足以替代项目验证。

3. Godot 4.6.2 本地源码关键证据
源码路径均在：
`/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Engine/godot-4.6.2-stable`

关键文件和行号（已用 `nl -ba` 读取）：
- `scene/2d/physics/collision_object_2d.cpp`
  - `NOTIFICATION_ENTER_TREE` 行 35-62：进树时设置 transform，再按 `disable_mode` / enabled 状态决定是否 `area_set_space/body_set_space`
  - `NOTIFICATION_EXIT_TREE` 行 93-107：退出树会 `area_set_space(rid, RID())` / `body_set_space(rid, RID())`，物理回调中直接移除会打印警告
  - `set_disable_mode` 行 215-232：只在 inside tree 且 disabled 时重新应用 disable mode
  - `_apply_disabled` 行 239-253：`DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE` 时，如果在树内，调用 `area_set_space(rid, RID())` / `body_set_space(rid, RID())`
  - `_apply_enabled` 行 268-279：恢复时重新设置 world space
  - `shape_owner_set_disabled` 行 319-330：最终调用 `PhysicsServer2D::area_set_shape_disabled/body_set_shape_disabled`
- `scene/2d/physics/area_2d.cpp`
  - `_clear_monitoring` 行 356-414：清 body_map/area_map 并发 exited
  - `_space_changed` 行 416-420：`p_new_space.is_null()` 时 `_clear_monitoring()`
  - `set_monitoring` 行 422-437：in/out signal 中禁止直接调用，提示用 `set_deferred`
  - `set_monitorable` 行 444-453：locked 或 flushing_queries 时禁止直接调用，提示用 `set_deferred`
- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_collision_object_2d.cpp`
  - `set_shape_disabled` 行 75-100：disabled 时 `broadphase->remove(shape.bpid)` 并加入 `pending_shape_update_list`；重新启用时也加入 pending shape update
  - `_update_shapes` 行 160-184：非 disabled shape 若 `bpid==0` 会 `broadphase->create`，然后 `broadphase->move`
  - `_set_space` 行 214-233：旧 space remove object 并从 broadphase remove shape；新 space add object 并 `_update_shapes()`
- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_area_pair_2d.cpp`
  - `GodotAreaPair2D::setup` 行 34-59：`collides_with` + solver 结果变化才 process collision
  - `pre_solve` 行 62-87：colliding 时 `add_body_to_query`，否则 `remove_body_from_query`
  - destructor 行 106-118：如果 colliding 且有 monitor callback，会 `remove_body_from_query`
  - `GodotArea2Pair2D` 行 122-150：area-area pair setup
  - constructor 行 177-184：`area_a_monitorable` / `area_b_monitorable` 在构造时快照
  - destructor 行 188-203：按构造时的 monitorable snapshot 决定 remove area query
- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_area_2d.cpp`
  - `_queue_monitor_update` 行 182-188：需要 space，不在 space 时无法入 monitor query list
  - `call_queries` 行 200-284：把 `monitored_bodies` / `monitored_areas` 中积累的 state 转成回调并清掉
- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_space_2d.cpp`
  - `_broadphase_pair` 行 1013-1035：broadphase pair 创建 `GodotAreaPair2D` / `GodotArea2Pair2D`
  - `_broadphase_unpair` 行 1043-1052：unpair 时 `memdelete` constraint
  - `call_queries` 行 1120-1131：处理 monitor query list
  - `update` 行 1143-1145：`broadphase->update()`
- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_physics_server_2d.cpp`
  - `body_set_shape_disabled` 行 650-657：有 `FLUSH_QUERY_CHECK`
  - `flush_queries` 行 1312-1325：设置 `flushing_queries=true`，调用 `E->call_queries()` 后 false
  - `_update_shapes` 行 1369-1374：处理 pending_shape_update_list
  - `step` 行 1290-1301：每步开始会 `_update_shapes()`，然后 stepper step
- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_step_2d.cpp`
  - `step` 行 129-159：space lock/setup，integrate forces，然后 `p_space->update()` 更新 broadphase 生成 collision pairs
  - 后续 constraint island / pre_solve 处理 area moving constraints

源码层关键判断：
- 这不是单纯 bug，而是 Godot 事件/物理设计的时序约束：
  - shape disabled/enable 是 broadphase entry remove/create，会导致 pair 销毁/重建，从而排队 exit/enter。
  - `Area2D` 的 signal/query 是物理步后 flush 的 deferred 事件，不是属性改变后立即稳定。
  - `monitoring/monitorable` 的直接修改在 signal/flush 中受限；`monitorable` 对 area-area pair 在 constructor 中快照，说明已有 pair 不一定即时响应开关语义。
  - `disable_mode=REMOVE` 本质是 `ProcessMode.Disabled` 下 set_space null，不等于对象池完整 spawn 状态机；它不解决 `Get(false)` 到 `Activate()` 半初始化窗口，也不解决业务事件过滤。
  - 脱树通过 exit tree 触发 `area_set_space/body_set_space(RID())`，配合 `_space_changed(null)` 清 monitoring，语义比只改属性更接近“物理世界退场”。
- 当前 SlimeAI 继续采用 “泊车位 + 脱树 + 挂树后同步禁用 + 两阶段激活” 是合理的。
- 推荐将 `disable_mode=REMOVE` 写为 `Adopt Later`：可作为辅助防线/实验对照，但不作为默认替代脱树。

4. 本地 Resources/Engine Docs 对照
已查：
- `Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md`
  - Unity Physics samples 对 SlimeAI 的有效启发是 stateful collision/trigger events、collision filter、validation/debug artifact，而不是复制 Unity Physics API。
  - 其中明确 `Adopt Now`: Collision Capability 应补 validation checklist；`Reject`: runtime collider mutation、immediate physics、multi physics world 等复杂机制。
- `Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/99-SlimeAI-引擎源码综合分析报告.md`
  - 也强调 Collision/Observation 需要 collision layer/mask、trigger enter/stay/exit、validation report，不迁移 Unity Physics API。
- 其他 ECS 框架（Bevy/Arch/DefaultEcs/Flecs）更多启发是 deferred structural change / command buffer / spawn-despawn flush，不直接解决 Godot Node/Physics pair 问题。
- 结论应写入文档：
  - 其他引擎/纯 ECS 没有 Godot Node 场景树 + PhysicsServer RID + Area signal queue 这个组合问题。
  - 可采纳的是“stateful event validation”和“deferred structural boundary”，不是复制其物理 API。

需要继续做的步骤：
1. 继续/补充 web 搜索结果摘要，必要时用 `web.run` 或 `fc` 抓 Godot issue #92691/#67731 的要点。不要过度依赖不稳定页面。
2. 读/必要时更新：
   - `DocsAI/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/Tests.md`：新增 “2026-06-03 Godot 源码结论”/“这是 bug 还是时序约束”/“测试新增 check”。
   - `DocsAI/ECS/Capabilities/Collision/Concepts/对象池碰撞兼容说明.md`：补充本地源码路径、行号、`disable_mode=REMOVE` 的真实语义、为什么仍默认脱树。
   - `SDD/.../Tool/ObjectPool/README.md`：补充本轮 ResearchAdoption Evidence / Inference / Unknown、Adopt Now/Later/Reject。
   - `SDD/.../Tool/ObjectPool/02-目标架构与重构路线.md`：补充 collision validation checks，例如：
     - `collision_source_shape_disable_recreates_pair`
     - `collision_area_pair_monitorable_snapshot`
     - `collision_disable_mode_remove_control`
     - `collision_detach_clears_space_and_monitoring`
3. 文档新增时建议结构：
   - `## 7. 2026-06-03 Godot 源码与社区研究结论`（Tests.md）
   - 表格：Research item | Evidence | Decision | SlimeAI 落点
   - `Evidence / Inference / Unknown`
   - `Adopt Now / Adopt Later / Reject`
4. 修改前先 `git status --short -- <target files>`。
5. 修改用 `apply_patch`。
6. 验证：
   - `python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all`
   - `git diff --check -- <modified paths>`
   - 对新增未跟踪文档可用 `git diff --no-index --check /dev/null <file>`，注意 exit code 1 但无输出代表无 whitespace 错误。
   - 不需要跑 `dotnet build`，如果只改文档，最终说明未跑 build 的原因。
7. 最终中文总结：
   - 更新了哪些文档
   - 核心裁决：不是取消脱树；不是把它简单归类为 bug；它是 Godot 物理/事件时序约束，ObjectPool 需要显式策略 + validation scene。
   - 验证结果
   - 说明未改测试源码、未跑 build（如适用）

Potential final docs content examples:
- `Tests.md` 可新增：
  - `collision_disable_enable_pair_rebuild`: validation scene 要证明 shape disabled/enable 不作为默认隔离策略，并记录旧位置 entered 计数。
  - `collision_disable_mode_remove_control`: 对照 `ProcessMode.Disabled + DisableMode.Remove` 与脱树；若能减少 pair，但不覆盖 Get(false) 半初始化，则仍不是默认。
  - `collision_monitorable_snapshot`: Area2D area-area pair 的 monitorable 是 pair 构造时快照，测试不能只断言属性值，要断言事件序列。
- `对象池碰撞兼容说明.md` 可新增：
  - “这是 bug 还是引擎时序”：社区 issue 可称 `confirmed physics issue/edge case`，但对 SlimeAI 来说按引擎时序约束处理，不等上游修复。
  - “其他引擎为什么较少遇到”：Unity DOTS/Bevy 不把 Node 场景树和 trigger signal queue 混成对象身份复用；它们更强调 stateful trigger event buffer 和 deferred structural commands。SlimeAI 采纳验证形态，不采纳物理 API。

Godot 4.6 官方/Context7 结论\n- 已跑：\n  - `npx ctx7@latest library \"Godot Engine\" \"...\"`\n  - 选中 `/websites/godotengine_en_4_6`\n  - `npx ctx7@latest docs /websites/godotengine_en_4_6 \"...\"`\n- 重要结果：\n  - `CollisionShape2D.disabled` 官方说明：disabled shape has no effect in world，但该属性 should be changed with `Object.set_deferred()`\n  - `Area2D.get_overlapping_bodies()`：overlap list is updated once during physics step, not immediately after objects are moved\n  - `Area2D.monitoring/monitorable` 只是检测/被检测开关，不保证清掉旧物理 pair / query event\n  - Context7 对 `CollisionObject2D.disable_mode` 有时偏到 3D，但本地源码已确认 2D 语义：`DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE` 与 `ProcessMode.Disabled` 下 `set_space(RID())` 相关\n\n2. Web / 社区线索\n- 已尝试 web search：\n  - “Godot Area2D disabled CollisionShape2D body_entered triggered when disabled enabled issue object pool”\n  - “Godot set_deferred CollisionShape2D disabled physics callback object pool ghost collision”\n  - “Godot Area2D monitoring monitorable change not updating existing collision pair issue”\n  - “Godot object pooling Area2D collision ghost body_entered disable enable”\n  - “Godot issue disable enable CollisionShape2D causes body_entered body_exited same frame #92691”\n  - “Godot issue Area2D monitorable existing pair not updated #67731”\n- 关键可引用：\n  - Godot issue `godotengine/godot#92691`：4.x confirmed physics 方向，和 “disable/enable shape 导致 exit + enter / stale events” 一致。\n  - 论坛/社区常见建议是 deferred、延后、离树、重建/重置状态，但这只说明需要状态机，不足以替代项目验证。\n\n3. Godot 4.6.2 本地源码关键证据\n源码路径均在：\n`/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources/Engine/Engine/godot-4.6.2-stable`\n\n关键文件和行号（已用 `nl -ba` 读取）：\n- `scene/2d/physics/collision_object_2d.cpp`\n  - `NOTIFICATION_ENTER_TREE` 行 35-62：进树时设置 transform，再按 `disable_mode` / enabled 状态决定是否 `area_set_space/body_set_space`\n  - `NOTIFICATION_EXIT_TREE` 行 93-107：退出树会 `area_set_space(rid, RID())` / `body_set_space(rid, RID())`，物理回调中直接移除会打印警告\n  - `set_disable_mode` 行 215-232：只在 inside tree 且 disabled 时重新应用 disable mode\n  - `_apply_disabled` 行 239-253：`DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE` 时，如果在树内，调用 `area_set_space(rid, RID())` / `body_set_space(rid, RID())`\n  - `_apply_enabled` 行 268-279：恢复时重新设置 world space\n  - `shape_owner_set_disabled` 行 319-330：最终调用 `PhysicsServer2D::area_set_shape_disabled/body_set_shape_disabled`\n- `scene/2d/physics/area_2d.cpp`\n  - `_clear_monitoring` 行 356-414：清 body_map/area_map 并发 exited\n  - `_space_changed` 行 416-420：`p_new_space.is_null()` 时 `_clear_monitoring()`\n  - `set_monitoring` 行 422-437：in/out signal 中禁止直接调用，提示用 `set_deferred`\n  - `set_monitorable` 行 444-453：locked 或 flushing_queries 时禁止直接调用，提示用 `set_deferred`\n- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_collision_object_2d.cpp`\n  - `set_shape_disabled` 行 75-100：disabled 时 `broadphase->remove(shape.bpid)` 并加入 `pending_shape_update_list`；重新启用时也加入 pending shape update\n  - `_update_shapes` 行 160-184：非 disabled shape 若 `bpid==0` 会 `broadphase->create`，然后 `broadphase->move`\n  - `_set_space` 行 214-233：旧 space remove object 并从 broadphase remove shape；新 space add object 并 `_update_shapes()`\n- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_area_pair_2d.cpp`\n  - `GodotAreaPair2D::setup` 行 34-59：`collides_with` + solver 结果变化才 process collision\n  - `pre_solve` 行 62-87：colliding 时 `add_body_to_query`，否则 `remove_body_from_query`\n  - destructor 行 106-118：如果 colliding 且有 monitor callback，会 `remove_body_from_query`\n  - `GodotArea2Pair2D` 行 122-150：area-area pair setup\n  - constructor 行 177-184：`area_a_monitorable` / `area_b_monitorable` 在构造时快照\n  - destructor 行 188-203：按构造时的 monitorable snapshot 决定 remove area query\n- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_area_2d.cpp`\n  - `_queue_monitor_update` 行 182-188：需要 space，不在 space 时无法入 monitor query list\n  - `call_queries` 行 200-284：把 `monitored_bodies` / `monitored_areas` 中积累的 state 转成回调并清掉\n- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_space_2d.cpp`\n  - `_broadphase_pair` 行 1013-1035：broadphase pair 创建 `GodotAreaPair2D` / `GodotArea2Pair2D`\n  - `_broadphase_unpair` 行 1043-1052：unpair 时 `memdelete` constraint\n  - `call_queries` 行 1120-1131：处理 monitor query list\n  - `update` 行 1143-1145：`broadphase->update()`\n- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_physics_server_2d.cpp`\n  - `body_set_shape_disabled` 行 650-657：有 `FLUSH_QUERY_CHECK`\n  - `flush_queries` 行 1312-1325：设置 `flushing_queries=true`，调用 `E->call_queries()` 后 false\n  - `_update_shapes` 行 1369-1374：处理 pending_shape_update_list\n  - `step` 行 1290-1301：每步开始会 `_update_shapes()`，然后 stepper step\n- `modules/godot_physics_2d/godot_step_2d.cpp`\n  - `step` 行 129-159：space lock/setup，integrate forces，然后 `p_space->update()` 更新 broadphase 生成 collision pairs\n  - 后续 constraint island / pre_solve 处理 area moving constraints\n\n源码层关键判断：\n- 这不是单纯 bug，而是 Godot 事件/物理设计的时序约束：\n  - shape disabled/enable 是 broadphase entry remove/create，会导致 pair 销毁/重建，从而排队 exit/enter。\n  - `Area2D` 的 signal/query 是物理步后 flush 的 deferred 事件，不是属性改变后立即稳定。\n  - `monitoring/monitorable` 的直接修改在 signal/flush 中受限；`monitorable` 对 area-area pair 在 constructor 中快照，说明已有 pair 不一定即时响应开关语义。\n  - `disable_mode=REMOVE` 本质是 `ProcessMode.Disabled` 下 set_space null，不等于对象池完整 spawn 状态机；它不解决 `Get(false)` 到 `Activate()` 半初始化窗口，也不解决业务事件过滤。\n  - 脱树通过 exit tree 触发 `area_set_space/body_set_space(RID())`，配合 `_space_changed(null)` 清 monitoring，语义比只改属性更接近“物理世界退场”。\n- 当前 SlimeAI 继续采用 “泊车位 + 脱树 + 挂树后同步禁用 + 两阶段激活” 是合理的。\n- 推荐将 `disable_mode=REMOVE` 写为 `Adopt Later`：可作为辅助防线/实验对照，但不作为默认替代脱树。\n\n4. 本地 Resources/Engine Docs 对照\n已查：\n- `Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/EntityComponentSystemSamples/07-Unity-Entities-Samples-源码分析报告.md`\n  - Unity Physics samples 对 SlimeAI 的有效启发是 stateful collision/trigger events、collision filter、validation/debug artifact，而不是复制 Unity Physics API。\n  - 其中明确 `Adopt Now`: Collision Capability 应补 validation checklist；`Reject`: runtime collider mutation、immediate physics、multi physics world 等复杂机制。\n- `Resources/Engine/Docs/FrameworkAnalysis/Reports/99-SlimeAI-引擎源码综合分析报告.md`\n  - 也强调 Collision/Observation 需要 collision layer/mask、trigger enter/stay/exit、validation report，不迁移 Unity Physics API。\n- 其他 ECS 框架（Bevy/Arch/DefaultEcs/Flecs）更多启发是 deferred structural change / command buffer / spawn-despawn flush，不直接解决 Godot Node/Physics pair 问题。\n- 结论应写入文档：\n  - 其他引擎/纯 ECS 没有 Godot Node 场景树 + PhysicsServer RID + Area signal queue 这个组合问题。\n  - 可采纳的是“stateful event validation”和“deferred structural boundary”，不是复制其物理 API。\n\n需要继续做的步骤：\n1. 继续/补充 web 搜索结果摘要，必要时用 `web.run` 或 `fc` 抓 Godot issue #92691/#67731 的要点。不要过度依赖不稳定页面。\n2. 读/必要时更新：\n   -           "text": "<collaboration_mode># Collaboration Mode: Default\n\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\n\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\n\n## request_user_input availability\n\nUse the `request_user_input` tool only when it is listed in the available tools for this turn.\n\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\n</collaboration_mode>"
```json
        },
```

````json
          "text": "# AGENTS.md instructions for /home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI\n\n<INSTRUCTIONS>\n# Global Rules\n\n- 默认中文回答；命令、代码、错误信息保留原文。\n- 注释要用中文\n- 不确定就说明，不要猜。\n- 大任务先计划，再执行。\n- 改文件前先读相关文件，改完总结改动和验证结果。\n- 能验证就跑构建/测试，不能验证说明原因。\n- 不要随意加依赖、大重构、commit、push。\n\n## CLI First\n\n- 优先 CLI / 项目脚本，不默认用 MCP。\n- 常用工具：`rg`, `fd`, `tree`, `eza`, `bat`, `jq`, `git`, `gh`, `lazygit`, `curl`, `http`, `fc`, `dotnet`, `docker`。\n- `fc` 是 `firecrawl` 的 wrapper，用法和 `firecrawl` 完全一样；不用直接执行 `firecrawl`，因为当前环境直接执行会走 `ALL_PROXY=socks5h://...`，容易报 `Error: protocol mismatch`。\n- 如果常用工具不可用，不要卡住；改用基础命令，例如 `cat`, `ls`, `find`, `grep`, `sed`。\n- GitHub 源码分析优先 clone 到本地后用 `rg/fd/bat/tree`。\n- **代码语义搜索优先 `semble`**：自然语言查询相关代码片段，比 grep 节省约 98% Token，纯 CPU 无需 API Key。已生成 `.claude/agents/semble-search.md` 子代理配置。用法：`semble search \"<query>\" [path]`，`semble find-related <file> <line> [path]`。\n- Godot C# 构建优先 `dotnet build`，必要时 `godot --headless --build-solutions --path .`。\n- 使用不熟悉的外部 CLI 前，先运行 `--help`，不要猜参数。\n- 外部工具 / Skill / MCP / 浏览器自动化只在明确需要时使用；高风险或写操作前先说明并确认。\n\n## Git Safety\n\n- 涉及文件修改时，前后必须 `git status --short` 确认范围。\n- 默认不要完整 `git diff`，除非需要自查或用户要求。\n- 不要覆盖、回滚、删除用户已有改动。\n- **AI 可自动 commit**。每次 commit 必须：\n  1. 先 `git status --short` 确认本轮改动范围；\n  2. commit message 明确说明 What / Why / 来源 OpenSpec change（如有）；\n  3. 不混入用户既有未追踪/未提交改动；\n  4. 跨 git 边界（工作区根 / SlimeAI/ / Games/<Game>/）分别 commit。\n- **默认不要 `git push`**。push 必须用户明确确认或在自动化任务的 `--push` 显式标记下执行。\n- 禁止 `git push --force`、`git reset --hard <remote>`、`git rebase --onto`、`git filter-branch` 等改写历史的操作，除非用户明确要求并说明回滚预案。\n- 禁止跨仓库把一个 git 边界的改动 add 到另一个仓库。\n- 完成 OpenSpec change 时，**archive + baseline 合入 + commit 是默认动作**，不再要求用户单独授权。push 仍需确认。\n\n## Safety\n\n- 危险命令必须先确认：`rm -rf`, `git reset --hard`, `git clean -fd`, `git push --force`, 删除大量文件, 覆盖配置文件。\n- 如果 sandbox / bwrap 导致命令失败，不要反复重试同一命令；换基础命令或说明需要授权。\n\n<!-- context7 -->\nUse the `ctx7` CLI to fetch current documentation whenever the user asks about a library, framework, SDK, API, CLI tool, or cloud service -- even well-known ones like React, Next.js, Prisma, Express, Tailwind, Django, or Spring Boot. This includes API syntax, configuration, version migration, library-specific debugging, setup instructions, and CLI tool usage. Use even when you think you know the answer -- your training data may not reflect recent changes. Prefer this over web search for library docs.\n\nDo not use for: refactoring, writing scripts from scratch, debugging business logic, code review, or general programming concepts.\n\n## Steps\n\n1. Resolve library: `npx ctx7@latest library <name> \"<user's question>\"` — use the official library name with proper punctuation (e.g., \"Next.js\" not \"nextjs\", \"Customer.io\" not \"customerio\", \"Three.js\" not \"threejs\")\n2. Pick the best match (ID format: `/org/project`) by: exact name match, description relevance, code snippet count, source reputation (High/Medium preferred), and benchmark score (higher is better). If results don't look right, try alternate names or queries (e.g., \"next.js\" not \"nextjs\", or rephrase the question)\n3. Fetch docs: `npx ctx7@latest docs <libraryId> \"<user's question>\"`\n4. Answer using the fetched documentation\n\nYou MUST call `library` first to get a valid ID unless the user provides one directly in `/org/project` format. Use the user's full question as the query -- specific and detailed queries return better results than vague single words. Do not run more than 3 commands per question. Do not include sensitive information (API keys, passwords, credentials) in queries.\n\nFor version-specific docs, use `/org/project/version` from the `library` output (e.g., `/vercel/next.js/v14.3.0`).\n\nIf a command fails with a quota error, inform the user and suggest `npx ctx7@latest login` or setting `CONTEXT7_API_KEY` env var for higher limits. Do not silently fall back to training data.\nRun Context7 CLI requests outside Codex's default sandbox. If a Context7 CLI command fails with DNS or network errors such as ENOTFOUND, host resolution failures, or fetch failed, rerun it outside the sandbox instead of retrying inside the sandbox.\n<!-- context7 -->\n\n--- project-doc ---\n\n# SlimeAI ECS 框架仓规则\n\n## 定位\n\n这是 SlimeAI ECS 框架仓，也是 AI 主目录。优先目标是让 AI 能稳定路由、验证和复盘：入口少、事实源少、命令可重复、artifact 可检查。\n\n默认入口：\n\n```text\nAGENTS.md -> DocsAI/README.md -> DocsAI/ECS/README.md -> SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/README.md -> SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/INDEX.md -> DocsAI/ECS/<Runtime|Capabilities|Tools|UI>/<owner>/完整文档 -> owner skill -> 验证脚本\n```\n\nSystemAgent 不作为 ECS 业务事实源第一入口；它只作为流程工具（设计发现、SDD 管理、AI config 同步、验证发布、复盘）。\n\n## Git 边界\n\n- 当前仓：`/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI`。\n- 外层资源：`/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources`，只作显式研究输入。\n- 游戏仓：`/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Games/*`，需要时单独进入对应仓运行 `git status --short`。\n- 游戏 submodule：`Games/*/SlimeAI/` 仍是只读镜像，禁止直接做框架业务改动。\n- 不把外层 `/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI` 描述为当前 AI 配置仓。\n\n框架改动默认在当前仓处理；游戏仓或外层资源目录只在任务明确涉及时访问。\n\n执行 git status、git diff、commit、branch 等操作前，必须先确认当前 Git 边界。\n\n## 必读入口\n\n- 方向入口：`DocsAI/README.md`\n- 框架文档：`DocsAI/ECS/README.md`（按 Runtime / Capabilities / Tools / UI 聚合）\n- 当前项目设计：`SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/README.md`\n- 设计索引：`SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/INDEX.md`\n- 模块事实源：Runtime owner 读 `DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/<Entity|Data|Event|System>/`；功能 owner 读 `DocsAI/ECS/Capabilities/<owner>/`；工具和 UI 读 `DocsAI/ECS/Tools/<owner>/`、`DocsAI/ECS/UI/`。\n- Data 当前说明：`DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/Data/Data系统说明.md`\n- 设计思考：`DocsAI/思考/`\n- 流程工具：`Workspace/SystemAgent/README.md`\n- Godot 场景测试：`Src/ECS/Test/**` 测试源码、`Games/BrotatoLike/Tools/run-godot-scene.sh`\n\n## 事实源边界\n\n- `DocsAI/`：框架文档统一入口，AI-first 设计。默认按 `Runtime / Capabilities / Tools / UI` 聚合；owner 文档优先有清晰 `README.md` 或完整事实源文档，Concept / Usage / Tests / InputMap 等只是可选分层，不强制拆分。旧 `System/`、`Component/`、`Entity/`、`Data/`、`Event/` 只作为迁移追溯，不作为新任务入口。\n- `SDD/`：中大型任务设计、进度、执行记忆。项目级 SDD 在 `SDD/project/projects/`。\n- `Src/ECS/**`：源码入口；框架 Markdown 文档统一由 `DocsAI/ECS/` 管理，`Src/ECS` 不保留框架文档。\n- `.ai-config/skills/*`：唯一可维护 skill 源，保存 skill 路由、命令、reference 和脚本入口。\n- `.ai-config/rules/rules.md`：rule 源。\n- `.claude/.codex.windsurf/skills`、`AGENTS.md`、`CLAUDE.md`、`.windsurf/rules/windsurfrules.md`：同步副本，不直接维护。\n- `.claude/settings.json`、`.claude/agents/`、`.codex/hooks.json`、`.codex/agents/`、`.codex/config.toml`：hook/subagent 运行配置，直接维护，不走 `.ai-config` 同步。\n- `Workspace/SystemAgent/`：流程、角色、gate、hook、skill-test 工具。\n- `Workspace/SDD/`：SDD CLI、模板和校验规则。\n- `Workspace/DocsAI/`：工作区级文档（Git submodule、多游戏架构、AI 流程），与框架文档分离。\n- `openspec/`：仅保留历史资产和显式兼容维护入口，不作为默认计划或执行入口。\n\n## 修改规则\n\n- 默认中文回答；命令、代码、错误信息保留原文。\n- 改文件前先读相关文件；涉及文件修改时前后运行 `git status --short`。\n- 大型功能、架构变更、跨模块重构、长期设计决策优先使用 SDD。\n- 不要把 BrotatoLike 专属玩法、UI、资产路径上提为框架默认。\n- 不随意加依赖、大重构。AI 可自动 commit（需先 `git status --short` + 明确 message）；push 需确认。\n- 不覆盖、回滚、删除用户已有改动。\n\n## Git 操作约束\n\n- 执行任何 git 操作前，先确认当前 Git 边界。\n- 更新游戏仓的 SlimeAI submodule：优先使用 VSCode Task `update: BrotatoLike SlimeAI Submodule`。\n- 手动更新时：\n  1. `cd Games/<Game>`（不是框架仓）\n  2. `git submodule update --remote SlimeAI`\n  3. 如报错\"未跟踪文件将被覆盖\"：先在 `SlimeAI/` 目录内处理（提交到框架仓或 `git clean -fd`）\n  4. 最后在游戏仓 `git add SlimeAI && git commit`\n- 禁止在游戏仓的 `SlimeAI/` 目录内直接做业务改动。\n- `**/*.uid` 已在框架仓 `.gitignore` 中全局忽略；如发现未跟踪 `.uid` 文件，先确认 `.gitignore` 是否生效。\n\n## 工作区视野约束\n\n- 日常开发关注：当前仓（`Src/`、`SDD/`、`DocsAI/`、`.ai-config/`）、`Games/BrotatoLike/`\n- `Resources/Engine/` —— 引擎源码与框架分析报告，研究参考时查阅\n- `Resources/Games/` —— 破解游戏逆向素材与分析文档，游戏机制参考时查阅\n- `Resources/Agent/` —— 外部 AI 项目分析，agent 工作流参考时查阅\n- `Resources/Else/` —— 旧框架代码，仅迁移对照，禁止作为事实源\n\n## AI 配置统一源\n\n本仓同时维护 Claude、Codex、Windsurf 的 skill、rule、command、hook 和 subagent。**skill/rule/command 使用 `.ai-config` 统一源；hook/subagent 直接写工具项目配置。**\n\n| 类型 | 维护位置 | 副本位置 | 同步方式 |\n| ---- | ------ | -------- | -------- |\n| Skill | `.ai-config/skills/<category>/<name>/SKILL.md` | `.codex/skills/`、`.claude/skills/`、`.windsurf/skills/`（打平） | `bash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh` |\n| Rule | `.ai-config/rules/rules.md` | `AGENTS.md`、`CLAUDE.md`、`.windsurf/rules/windsurfrules.md` | 同上（Windsurf 副本由脚本自动追加 frontmatter） |\n| Command | `.ai-config/skills/<category>/<name>/SKILL.md` | `.claude/commands/opsx/*.md`（仅兼容命令需要时生成） | 同上（脚本自动转换格式） |\n| Claude hook | `.claude/settings.json` | 无副本 | 直接维护 |\n| Claude subagent | `.claude/agents/*.md` | 无副本 | 直接维护 |\n| Codex hook | `.codex/hooks.json` | 无副本 | 直接维护 |\n| Codex subagent | `.codex/agents/*.toml`、`.codex/config.toml` | 无副本 | 直接维护 |\n\n**skill/rule/command 只改 `.ai-config/`，不改副本**。脚本通过遍历实现，不硬编码分类名；`.ai-config/skills/` 下一层目录作为分类，skill 目录在分类下，同步时自动打平到各工具顶层。\n\n**禁止直接修改同步副本**：`.codex/skills/`、`.claude/skills/`、`.windsurf/skills/`、`.claude/commands/opsx/`、`AGENTS.md`、`CLAUDE.md`、`.windsurf/rules/windsurfrules.md`。\n改完后**必须**运行 `bash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh`，否则副本会被下次同步覆盖。\n\n**允许直接修改项目运行配置**：`.claude/settings.json`、`.claude/agents/`、`.codex/hooks.json`、`.codex/agents/`、`.codex/config.toml`。这些不是 `.ai-config` 同步副本。\n\n## SDD 工作流\n\n- SDD 是中大型任务的默认计划、执行记忆和恢复事实源；格式与 CLI 以 `Workspace/SDD/` 为准。\n- 大型功能、架构变更、跨模块重构、长期设计决策、迁移账本和跨目录文档治理，优先进入 `SDD/project/projects/`。\n- 探索阶段可普通分析，只读代码和文档，不直接改实现；深度思考 / 需求确认使用 `systemagent-deepthink`。只有需要任务落盘、跨会话恢复或正式执行记忆时，才进入 `sdd-workflow` / `sdd-management`。\n- 创建和管理任务使用 `sdd-workflow` / `sdd-management`，并维护 `README.md`、`design/`、`tasks.md`、`progress.md`、`bdd.md`。\n- 执行中每完成一批任务，及时更新对应 `tasks.md` checkbox 和 `progress.md` Latest Resume，并同步必要的 `DocsAI/ECS/`、SDD design 或游戏侧状态文档。\n- 完成后按影响面运行验证；文档类至少检查 `python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate <sdd-id>` 和目标文件清单，代码类按下方验证入口执行。\n- 极小修复、拼写、链接、注释、临时排查和一次性脚本不强制使用 SDD；必要时仍更新相关状态文档。\n\n## ECS 架构红线\n\n**Entity 生命周期**\n- ❌ 直接 `new Entity()` → 必须 `EntityManager.Spawn/Register`\n- ❌ 直接 `entity.QueueFree()` → 必须 `EntityManager.Destroy`\n\n**数据存储**\n- ❌ Component 私有业务状态字段（`_currentHp`、`_moveSpeed`）→ 存 `Data`\n- ❌ `Data.On()` 监听数据变化 → 用 `Entity.Events`\n- ❌ 字符串字面量访问 Data（`\"CurrentHp\"`）→ 用 descriptor 生成的 typed `DataKey<T>`\n- ❌ 新增 `const string` / `DataMeta` DataKey → 先写 DataOS descriptor，再生成 typed handle\n\n**Data 规则（SDD-0022 后状态）**\n- 新增 DataKey 先写 DataOS descriptor。\n- runtime snapshot 是运行时字段定义与 records 的来源。\n- generated handle 是业务访问入口。\n- 不恢复旧 `DataMeta` / `DataRegistry` / `DataKey_Compatibility` 作为事实源。\n\n**通信**\n- ❌ Godot Signal 处理核心逻辑 → 用 `EventBus`\n- ❌ 直接调用其他 Component 方法 → 用 `Entity.Events`\n\n**资源加载**\n- ❌ `GD.Load<T>(\"res://...\")` / `ResourceLoader.Load(...)` → 用 `ResourceManagement.Load`\n\n**系统调用**\n- ❌ `new Timer()` / `GetTree().CreateTimer()` → 用 `TimerManager`\n- ❌ `GetTree().GetNodesInGroup()` / 手写距离计算 → 用 `TargetSelector`\n- ❌ 直接修改 `CurrentHp` → 用 `DamageService.Instance.Process()`\n- ❌ 手写暴击/闪避/冷却/充能/范围检测 → 用对应系统组件\n- ❌ 手动 `new` + `QueueFree()` 高频对象 → 用对象池\n- ❌ `_Process` 中禁止 `new` 对象和 LINQ\n\n## 交互规则\n\n- 必须使用中文回复\n- 避免删除再创建文件，尽量修改文件\n- 禁止使用 PowerShell 命令\n- 新增或修改的代码要增加适当注释\n- 修改框架相关实现/接口/流程后，必须同步更新对应 Skill 文档\n\n## 验证入口\n\n框架验证：\n\n```bash\ncd /home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI\ndotnet build Brotato_my.csproj --no-restore /clp:ErrorsOnly\nbash Data/DataOS/Tools/validate-dataos.sh Data/DataOS/Authoring/slimeainew.authoring.db\n```\n\nSDD / AI 配置验证：\n\n```bash\ncd /home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI\npython3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all\nbash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh\nbash Workspace/SystemAgent/Tools/skill-test/lint.sh static all --no-fail --summary-only\n```\n\nGodot 场景验证仍需要进入承载游戏仓：\n\n```bash\ncd /home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Games/<GameWithRunner>\nTools/run-godot-scene.sh run res://Scenes/Main.tscn --timeout 10 --log-dir .ai-temp/scene-tests/runs\nTools/analyze-godot-scene-logs.sh\n```\n\n</INSTRUCTIONS>"
````
